name: Prasanna
subject: Quick help for BSC.CSIT student
body:
Hi Prasanna,
I noticed you're working towards improving your exam performance in BSC.CSIT. I've been in your shoes before and I know how tough it can get. That's why I wanted to reach out and see if our notes, videos, and past questions could help you identify and work on your weak areas.
Best, Prasanna Niroula
